judge_result.short_rationale: The canonical response is fresh air/keep calm, then seek medical attention for any symptomatic inhalation exposure. The answer omits immediate medical attention, incorrectly delays it until symptoms worsen, and adds unsupported cross-incident advice (washing mouth/nose, do not induce vomiting).
